reason: Fundamental rubric conflict: behavior_in_task_description requires instruction to specify exact strings (constructor(options: LLMOptions), super(options), startsWith('kimi'), etc.) that instruction_no_hint_leakage treats as solution leakage. Cannot satisfy both without breaking one. Additionally, solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text failures are test-level issues (text-matching-based assertions, not behavioral verification) — the tests themselves need rewrite to check behavior rather than exact substrings.
